data: Learn how to collaborate effectively with team members

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to suggest ways to collaborate with your team effectively.

Good collaboration improves results and creates a positive team culture.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/450203b8-d7a6-48c8-bf90-7545f89770dd-53.-Collaborating-with-Team-Members.jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to suggest a teamwork approach, use this structure:

"If we [suggestion], we can achieve [outcome] more effectively."

For example: "If we divide the tasks equally, we can achieve the project deadline more effectively."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/450203b8-d7a6-48c8-bf90-7545f89770dd-53.-Collaborating-with-Team-Members.jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If your team needs better coordination, you can say:

"If we schedule a daily check-in, we can achieve better team coordination more effectively."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/450203b8-d7a6-48c8-bf90-7545f89770dd-53.-Collaborating-with-Team-Members.jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
This structure helps you propose solutions in a positive and forward-looking way.

It focuses on what the team can gain by working together.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/450203b8-d7a6-48c8-bf90-7545f89770dd-53.-Collaborating-with-Team-Members.jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice collaborating with team members!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to suggest a teamwork approach

1.If we divide the tasks equally, we can achieve the project deadline more effectively.
2.Someone else should do most of the work so the rest of us can focus on other things.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to propose a collaboration strategy

1.If we schedule a daily check-in, we can achieve better team coordination more effectively.
2.We should meet every day but I am not sure if everyone will agree to that.

Correct answer: 1

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. Your team is struggling to meet a deadline. How do you suggest a way to work together?'

'2. Your project has too many tasks for one person. How do you propose dividing the work?'

'3. Your team members are not communicating well. How do you suggest a solution?'

'4. Your group needs to improve its productivity. How do you propose a collaborative approach?'

'5. Your team is working on a presentation together. How do you suggest a way to collaborate?'"
